member.name: T:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.ConfigurationLoader
member.summary: Loads configuration from files with sensible defaults

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.ConfigurationLoader.Load(System.String)
member.summary: Load configuration from file or use defaults

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.ConfigurationLoader.Save(Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.DocSummarizerConfig,System.String)
member.summary: Save configuration to file

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.ConfigurationLoader.CreateDefault(System.String)
member.summary: Create a default configuration file

member.name: T:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.DocSummarizerConfig
member.summary: Configuration for the document summarizer

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.DocSummarizerConfig.Ollama
member.summary: Ollama configuration

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.DocSummarizerConfig.Docling
member.summary: Docling configuration

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.DocSummarizerConfig.Qdrant
member.summary: Qdrant configuration

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.DocSummarizerConfig.Processing
member.summary: Processing configuration

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.DocSummarizerConfig.Output
member.summary: Output configuration

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.DocSummarizerConfig.Batch
member.summary: Batch processing configuration

member.name: T:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.OllamaConfig
member.summary: Ollama service configuration

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.OllamaConfig.BaseUrl
member.summary: Base URL for Ollama service

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.OllamaConfig.Model
member.summary: Model to use for generation. Default is ministral-3:3b for good quality. Models under 3B parameters (e.g., gemma3:1b) produce poor quality summaries.

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.OllamaConfig.EmbedModel
member.summary: Model to use for embeddings

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.OllamaConfig.Temperature
member.summary: Temperature for generation

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.OllamaConfig.TimeoutSeconds
member.summary: Request timeout in seconds

member.name: T:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.DoclingConfig
member.summary: Docling service configuration

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.DoclingConfig.BaseUrl
member.summary: Base URL for Docling service

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.DoclingConfig.TimeoutSeconds
member.summary: Request timeout in seconds

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.DoclingConfig.PdfBackend
member.summary: PDF backend to use. Options: pypdfium2, dlparse_v1, dlparse_v2, dlparse_v4 pypdfium2 is more compatible with various PDFs but may be slower. dlparse_v4 is faster but may fail on some PDFs with non-standard page dimensions.

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.DoclingConfig.PagesPerChunk
member.summary: Number of pages per chunk for split processing of large PDFs

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.DoclingConfig.MaxConcurrentChunks
member.summary: Maximum concurrent chunks when split processing PDFs

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.DoclingConfig.EnableSplitProcessing
member.summary: Enable split processing for large PDFs (better progress feedback)

member.name: T:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.QdrantConfig
member.summary: Qdrant service configuration

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.QdrantConfig.Host
member.summary: Qdrant host

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.QdrantConfig.Port
member.summary: Qdrant port

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.QdrantConfig.CollectionName
member.summary: Collection name for documents

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.QdrantConfig.VectorSize
member.summary: Vector size for embeddings

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.QdrantConfig.DeleteCollectionAfterSummarization
member.summary: Delete the Qdrant collection after summarization completes. Default is true to prevent stale data and collection name collisions. Set to false if you want to reuse the index for subsequent queries.

member.name: T:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.ProcessingConfig
member.summary: Processing configuration

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.ProcessingConfig.MaxHeadingLevel
member.summary: Maximum heading level to use for chunking (1-6). Default is 2 (split on H1 and H2 only). Lower values = fewer, larger chunks.

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.ProcessingConfig.TargetChunkTokens
member.summary: Target chunk size in tokens. Default 0 means auto-calculate based on model context window. Small sections will be merged until they approach this size.

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.ProcessingConfig.MinChunkTokens
member.summary: Minimum chunk size in tokens before merging with adjacent sections. Default 0 means auto-calculate (1/8 of target).

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.ProcessingConfig.RagTopK
member.summary: Number of chunks to retrieve in RAG mode

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.ProcessingConfig.MaxLlmParallelism
member.summary: Maximum parallel LLM requests. Ollama processes one request at a time per model, so high values just queue requests. 8 is a good balance for throughput vs memory.

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.ProcessingConfig.RagMaxTopics
member.summary: Number of topics to extract in RAG mode

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.ProcessingConfig.EnableParallel
member.summary: Enable parallel processing where possible

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.ProcessingConfig.MaxDegreeOfParallelism
member.summary: Maximum degree of parallelism

member.name: T:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.OutputConfig
member.summary: Output configuration

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.OutputConfig.Format
member.summary: Output format: console, text, markdown, json

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.OutputConfig.OutputDirectory
member.summary: Output directory for file outputs

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.OutputConfig.IncludeTrace
member.summary: Include trace information in output

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.OutputConfig.IncludeTopics
member.summary: Include topic summaries in output

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.OutputConfig.IncludeOpenQuestions
member.summary: Include open questions in output

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.OutputConfig.Verbose
member.summary: Verbose output

member.name: T:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.BatchConfig
member.summary: Batch processing configuration

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.BatchConfig.FileExtensions
member.summary: File extensions to process (e.g., ".pdf", ".docx", ".md")

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.BatchConfig.Recursive
member.summary: Recursive directory processing

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.BatchConfig.IncludePatterns
member.summary: File name patterns to include (glob patterns)

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.BatchConfig.ExcludePatterns
member.summary: File name patterns to exclude (glob patterns)

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.BatchConfig.ContinueOnError
member.summary: Continue on error

member.name: P:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.BatchConfig.CreateIndex
member.summary: Create summary index file

member.name: T:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.OutputFormat
member.summary: Output format enumeration

member.name: F:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.OutputFormat.Console
member.summary: Console output with formatting

member.name: F:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.OutputFormat.Text
member.summary: Plain text file

member.name: F:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.OutputFormat.Markdown
member.summary: Markdown file

member.name: F:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.OutputFormat.Json
member.summary: JSON file

member.name: T:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.BatchProcessor
member.summary: Handles batch processing of multiple documents

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.BatchProcessor.ProcessDirectoryAsync(System.String,Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Models.SummarizationMode,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Process all documents in a directory

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.BatchProcessor.ProcessFileAsync(System.String,Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Models.SummarizationMode,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Process a single file with error handling

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.BatchProcessor.FindMatchingFiles(System.String)
member.summary: Find files matching the configured patterns

member.name: F:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.DoclingClient.DefaultTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout for document conversion (10 minutes for large PDFs)

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.DoclingClient.GetPdfPageCount(System.String)
member.summary: Get the number of pages in a PDF using PdfPig

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.DoclingClient.ConvertPdfWithSplitProcessingAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Convert PDF using split processing for better parallelism and progress feedback

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.DoclingClient.ConvertDocxWithSplitProcessingAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Convert DOCX using split processing by chapters for large files

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.DoclingClient.GetDocxChapters(System.String)
member.summary: Extract chapter boundaries from a DOCX file based on Heading1/Heading2 styles

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.DoclingClient.CreateDocxFromChapter(System.String,Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.DoclingClient.DocxChapter,System.String)
member.summary: Create a new DOCX file containing only the specified chapter

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.DocumentChunker.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Creates a new document chunker.
member.param: Maximum heading level to split on (1-6). Default is 2 (H1 and H2 only).
Target chunk size in tokens. Default is 4000 (~16KB). Chunks smaller than this will be merged with adjacent sections.
Minimum chunk size before merging. Default is 500 (~2KB).

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.DocumentSummarizer.GetMapReduceSummarizerAsync
member.summary: Get or create the MapReduce summarizer with context-window-aware settings

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.DocumentSummarizer.GetContextWindowAsync
member.summary: Get the model's context window (cached)

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.DocumentSummarizer.CreateChunkerAsync
member.summary: Create a chunker with context-window-aware sizing

member.name: F:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.MapReduceSummarizer.DefaultMaxParallelism
member.summary: Default max parallelism for LLM calls. Ollama processes one request at a time per model, so high values just queue requests. 8 is a good balance for throughput vs memory.

member.name: F:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.MapReduceSummarizer.ContextWindowTargetPercent
member.summary: Target percentage of context window to use for reduce phase input. Leave room for the prompt template and output generation.

member.name: F:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.MapReduceSummarizer.CharsPerToken
member.summary: Approximate characters per token for estimation (conservative estimate)

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.MapReduceSummarizer.CreateAsync(Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.OllamaService,System.Boolean,System.Int32)
member.summary: Create a MapReduceSummarizer with auto-detected context window from the model

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.MapReduceSummarizer.HierarchicalReduceAsync(System.Collections.Generic.List{Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Models.ChunkSummary},System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Hierarchical reduction: batch summaries, reduce each batch, then reduce the batch results

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.MapReduceSummarizer.CreateBatches(System.Collections.Generic.List{Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Models.ChunkSummary},System.Int32)
member.summary: Create batches of summaries that fit within the token limit

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.MapReduceSummarizer.SingleReduceAsync(System.Collections.Generic.List{Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Models.ChunkSummary},System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String},System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Single-pass reduction of summaries

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.MapReduceSummarizer.EstimateTokens(System.Collections.Generic.List{Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Models.ChunkSummary})
member.summary: Estimate token count for a list of summaries

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.MapReduceSummarizer.EstimateTokens(Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Models.ChunkSummary)
member.summary: Estimate token count for a single summary

member.name: F:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.OllamaService.DefaultTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout for LLM generation (10 minutes for large documents/slow models)

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.OllamaService.GetContextWindowAsync
member.summary: Get the context window size for the current model

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.OllamaService.GetContextWindowForModel(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Get context window for a model based on name or family

member.name: T:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.OutputFormatter
member.summary: Formats output in various formats

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.OutputFormatter.Format(Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Models.DocumentSummary,Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.OutputConfig,System.String)
member.summary: Format a document summary

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.OutputFormatter.FormatBatch(Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Models.BatchSummary,Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.OutputConfig)
member.summary: Format batch summary

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.OutputFormatter.WriteOutputAsync(System.String,Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Config.OutputConfig,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Write output to appropriate destination

member.name: T:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.ProgressService
member.summary: Provides progress feedback using Spectre.Console

member.name: F:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.ProgressService.DefaultLlmTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout for LLM operations (10 minutes for large documents)

member.name: F:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.ProgressService.DefaultDoclingTimeout
member.summary: Default timeout for document conversion (5 minutes for large PDFs)

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.ProgressService.WithStatusAsync``1(System.String,System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}})
member.summary: Display a status spinner while executing an async operation

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.ProgressService.WithProgressAsync``2(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Func{``0,Spectre.Console.ProgressTask,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``1}})
member.summary: Display a progress bar for multiple items with live updates

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.ProgressService.WithLiveTableAsync``2(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{``0},System.Func{``0,System.Int32},System.Func{``0,System.String},System.Func{``0,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``1}},System.Nullable{System.Int32})
member.summary: Display a live table that updates as chunks are processed

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.ProgressService.Info(System.String)
member.summary: Write a styled info message

member.summary: Write a styled success message

member.summary: Write a styled warning message

member.summary: Write a styled error message

member.summary: Display a rule/separator

member.summary: Display the final summary in a panel

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.ProgressService.DisplayTrace(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.TimeSpan,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Display trace information in a table

member.name: F:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.RagSummarizer.DefaultMaxParallelism
member.summary: Default max parallelism for LLM calls. Ollama processes one request at a time per model, so high values just queue requests. 8 is a good balance for throughput vs memory.

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.RagSummarizer.GetCollectionName(System.String)
member.summary: Generate a unique collection name for a document to prevent collisions

member.name: M:Mostlylucid.DocSummarizer.Services.RagSummarizer.DeleteCollectionAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Delete the collection for a document

member.name: T:Program
member.summary: Auto-generated public partial Program class for top-level statement apps.
